title: Trump whiplash: 'VERY HARD TONIGHT' → strike cancellation in same day
snippet: In a single day, Trump went from vowing 'The United States will be hitting Iran...VERY HARD TONIGHT' and threatening to seize Kharg Island, to cancelling all planned strikes and claiming a deal. He cited 'slow progress' for justifying the 2nd night of strikes but then reversed course. This represents the latest in a pattern of whiplash proclamations — at least 38 times he has claimed a deal is close.
tag_reason: Same-day reversal from escalation to de-escalation is new event; '38 times' deal claims statistic is new context
